statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); out="$dir  |  $model"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && out="$out  |  Context: ${remaining}% remaining"; echo "$out"
